ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree */,
  "leaf_width" REAL /* Width of the tree's leaves */,
  "leaf_length" REAL /* Length of the tree's leaves */,
  "trunk_girth" REAL /* Girth of the tree's trunk */,
  "trunk_height" REAL /* Height of the tree's trunk */,
  "tree_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree type */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the tree is located */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the tree was measured */,
  "measurer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the measurement */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the tree's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the tree's location */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the tree (e.g., healthy, diseased, dead) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tree's record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_measurer_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurer_id") REFERENCES measurers ("measurer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_tree_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_type_id") REFERENCES tree_types ("tree_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_types" (
  "tree_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree type */,
  "tree_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tree type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tree type */,
  "average_leaf_width" REAL /* Average leaf width for the tree type */,
  "average_leaf_length" REAL /* Average leaf length for the tree type */,
  "average_trunk_girth" REAL /* Average trunk girth for the tree type */,
  "average_trunk_height" REAL /* Average trunk height for the tree type */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate of the tree type */,
  "lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the tree type in years */,
  "tolerance_level" TEXT /* Tolerance level of the tree type to environmental conditions (e.g., drought, frost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the site in square meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the site */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurers" (
  "measurer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurer */,
  "measurer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the measurer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the measurer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the measurer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the measurer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the measurer within the organization */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the measurer has in forestry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement event */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree being measured */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the measurement */,
  "leaf_width" REAL /* Width of the tree's leaves */,
  "leaf_length" REAL /* Length of the tree's leaves */,
  "trunk_girth" REAL /* Girth of the tree's trunk */,
  "trunk_height" REAL /* Height of the tree's trunk */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or observations made during the measurement */,
  "measurement_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the measurement (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the measurement (e.g., sunny, rainy, foggy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurer_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurer_id") REFERENCES measurers ("measurer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or string listing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tree data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tree data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
